title: Aisa Feels the Danger
description: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Did you come from the blue seas?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah we flew up from below.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Everyone... I hope you're all safe...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just how the hell did you fall!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I won't let Emel have his way!

summary: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
